strengths: Strong experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex software projects
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and agentic AI at scale

response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with diverse technologies and experience with AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in fintech and operating AI systems in regulated environments.
